summary: Harsh, low‑level audience recording obscures the unusual Estimated‑Scarlet transition and unique Harmonica drums.
review: The reviewer found the recording harsh with low volume and a loud audience, making it difficult to enjoy the show. They noted an unusual Estimated Prophet → Scarlet Begonias transition and a unique Harmonica drums segment, but the poor sound quality prevents any clear assessment of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a low (2‑star) rating; recording issues dominate and there is insufficient detail on musical performance to raise the score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Harsh sound, low levels, audience noise loud; overall listening experience suffers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer mentions an unusual Estimated‑Prophet → Scarlet Begonias transition and a unique Harmonica drums segment, but cannot evaluate the set due to recording problems.
